'''âzh-th-p-s''' ('''kazhathpesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:longe|longe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-th-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:longe|longe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-th-p-s
|-
! Lemma
| kazhathpesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhathpesoko|thizhathpesoko]] || [[word:jizhathpesoko|jizhathpesoko]] || [[word:shizhathpesoko|shizhathpesoko]] || [[word:kizhathpesoko|kizhathpesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhathpesoko|thuthuzhathpesoko]] || [[word:jujuzhathpesoko|jujuzhathpesoko]] || [[word:shushuzhathpesoko|shushuzhathpesoko]] || [[word:kukuzhathpesoko|kukuzhathpesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhathpesoko|thuzhathpesoko]] || [[word:juzhathpesoko|juzhathpesoko]] || [[word:shuzhathpesoko|shuzhathpesoko]] || [[word:kuzhathpesoko|kuzhathpesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhathpesoko|thozhathpesoko]] || [[word:jozhathpesoko|jozhathpesoko]] || [[word:shozhathpesoko|shozhathpesoko]] || [[word:kozhathpesoko|kozhathpesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhathpesoko|thĂŠzhathpesoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzhathpesoko|jĂŠzhathpesoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzhathpesoko|shĂŠzhathpesoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzhathpesoko|kĂŠzhathpesoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhathpesoko|thazhathpesoko]] || [[word:jazhathpesoko|jazhathpesoko]] || [[word:shazhathpesoko|shazhathpesoko]] || [[word:kazhathpesoko|kazhathpesoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
